2606.18181.title: IUU+DB: Tracking Illegal, Unreported, and Unregulated Fishing, Seafood Fraud, and Labor Abuse through LLM-driven Information Extraction
2606.18181.paper_summary: Illegal, unreported, and unregulated fishing (IUU) traditionally refers to fishing activities that violate applicable laws or occur in areas that lack applicable laws. We propose the term IUU+ to capture a broader suite of fisheries sector environmental and associated supply chain trade-related crimes and behaviors. Although IUU+ activity is widely recognized as a serious threat to marine ecosystems, markets, and livelihoods, a quantitative understanding of these incidents, e.g., their frequency, geography, species, actors, and patterns in the type of illicit activity, remains difficult to obtain. We propose IUU+DB, a large language model driven system for building a global incident database of IUU+ activity. The system ingests heterogeneous documents, classifies whether they describe relevant incidents, extracts key data elements such as actors, locations, species, vessels, violations, and enforcement outcomes, and supports deduplication and trend analysis. Case studies and validation results show that IUU+DB can help organize fragmented evidence, surface geographic and behavioral hotspots, support fisheries-domain specific research in academia and non-government organizations, assist source and species risk assessments for industry, and provide support for policy implementation and targeted enforcement efforts to government agencies.
2606.18181.paper_summary_zh: 非法、未報告及未管制的漁業 (IUU) 傳統上指的是違反適用法律或發生在缺乏適用法律的區域的漁業活動。<lb/>我們提出 IUU+ 這個術語，以涵蓋更廣泛的漁業部門環境及相關供應鏈貿易相關犯罪和行為。<lb/>儘管 IUU+ 活動被廣泛認為對海洋生態系統、市場和生計構成嚴重威脅，但對這些事件的定量理解，例如它們的頻率、地理位置、物種、參與者和非法活動類型的模式，仍然難以獲得。<lb/>我們提出 IUU+DB，一個大型語言模型驅動的系統，用於建立全球 IUU+ 活動的事件數據庫。<lb/>該系統吸收異質文檔，分類它們是否描述相關事件，提取關鍵數據元素，如參與者、地點、物種、船隻、違規行為和執法結果，並支持去重和趨勢分析。<lb/>案例研究和驗證結果顯示，IUU+DB 可以幫助整理零散的證據，揭示地理和行為熱點，支持學術界和非政府組織的漁業領域特定研究，協助行業的來源和物種風險評估，並為政府機構的政策實施和針對性執法工作提供支持。
2606.18181.author: Henry Bodwell et.al.
2606.18181.authors: Henry Bodwell, Hong Yang, John C. Simeone, Kelvin Gorospe, Bella Sullivan, Lana Huang, Jessica Gephart, Sandy Aylesworth, Molly Masterton, Naren Ramakrishnan
